title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 198.124 - License may be issued to facility operated by receiver — duration
text:
198.124.  License may be issued to facility operated by receiver — duration. — Other provisions of sections 198.003 to 198.096 notwithstanding, the department may issue a license to a facility being operated by a receiver under sections 198.099 to 198.136. The duration of a license issued under this subsection is limited to the duration of the receivership.
(L. 1979 S.B. 328, et al. § 41) 
Effective 7-1-79
